description: Honeypot hit on :2222 from a known-bad IP (6.6.6.6, AbuseIPDB score 90/100). The scenario seeds both the incident and the AbuseIPDB reputation cache entry so the agent's per-incident lookup consults SQLite instead of hitting the live API. Stub AI escalates to BlockIp once it sees confidence_score>50. Target envelope per spec 024: 1 incident, ≤1 telegram, 1 block.
